description: Self-improvement engine Phase 1 — benchmark framework, CI/CD templates, new templates, agent improvements

tasks.title: Add CI/CD workflow to top 5 stack templates
tasks.description: Add .github/workflows/ci.yml and .devcontainer/devcontainer.json to web-app, saas-starter, ai-ml-app, web-t3, and api-service templates.
acceptance: Each of the 5 templates has ci_files section with .github/workflows/ci.yml
CI workflow runs test + lint + typecheck for the template's stack
Each template has .devcontainer/devcontainer.json
YAML syntax is valid for all new files

tasks.title: Create benchmark-runner agent and framework
tasks.description: Create benchmark-runner agent, 10 regression tasks, run-benchmark.sh CLI, and history.jsonl for score tracking.
acceptance: agents/core/benchmark-runner.md exists with proper frontmatter
benchmarks/tasks/ contains at least 10 regression task JSON files
scripts/run-benchmark.sh exists and is executable
Agent registered in agents/catalog.json

tasks.title: Create web-shadcn-v4 template
tasks.description: Flagship web template: Next.js 15 + shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4 + OKLCH tokens + accessibility + Vitest + CI/CD.
acceptance: config/stacks/web-shadcn-v4.yaml exists with full template spec
Template includes Tailwind v4 @theme block with OKLCH tokens
Template includes eslint-plugin-jsx-a11y for accessibility
Template includes CI/CD and vitest with coverage

tasks.title: Create saas-complete template
tasks.description: Full SaaS: Next.js 15 + shadcn + Stripe + Auth + Admin Dashboard + RBAC + Teams + Resend + CI/CD.
acceptance: config/stacks/saas-complete.yaml exists
Template includes admin dashboard, RBAC roles, team model
Template includes CI/CD and accessibility

tasks.title: Create ai-rag-complete template
tasks.description: Full AI/RAG: Next.js 15 + AI SDK + pgvector + multi-provider + tool calling + document ingestion + streaming.
acceptance: config/stacks/ai-rag-complete.yaml exists
Template includes multi-provider (OpenAI + Anthropic)
Template includes tool calling and document ingestion
Template includes CI/CD

tasks.title: Create mobile-gluestack and monorepo templates
tasks.description: Two new templates: mobile-gluestack (Expo 54 + Gluestack v3 + NativeWind v4) and monorepo (Turborepo + web + api + shared).
acceptance: config/stacks/mobile-gluestack.yaml exists with Expo Router + Gluestack + NativeWind
config/stacks/monorepo.yaml exists with Turborepo structure
Both YAML files are valid and follow existing template format

tasks.title: Create /benchmark and /benchmark-status commands
tasks.description: Commands to run benchmarks and view score history/trends.
acceptance: commands/benchmark.md invokes benchmark-runner agent
commands/benchmark-status.md shows history and trends
Both commands have proper frontmatter

tasks.title: Update README and commit everything
tasks.description: Update README with new templates and benchmark features. Final verification pass.
acceptance: README.md updated with new template count and benchmark features
All new files pass syntax validation
Git commit and push to feature branch
